[Linux_AR_Presentacion.html](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/25937471/Linux_AR_Presentacion.html)
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="es">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no">
  <title>Linux AR — Presentación</title>
  <style>
    * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
    body { background: #0D1117; font-family: 'Consolas', monospace; overflow: hidden; }

    #ar-container { position: relative; width: 100vw; height: 100vh; }

    /* Camera feed */
    #video { position: absolute; top:0; left:0; width:100%; height:100%; object-fit:cover; }

    /* AR overlay canvas */
    #canvas { position: absolute; top:0; left:0; width:100%; height:100%; pointer-events:none; }

    /* UI overlay */
    #ui {
      position: absolute; top:0; left:0; width:100%; height:100%;
      display: flex; flex-direction: column;
      justify-content: space-between; pointer-events: none;
    }

    /* Top bar */
    #topbar {
      background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(13,17,23,0.95) 0%, transparent 100%);
      padding: 14px 20px 24px;
      display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px;
      pointer-events: auto;
    }
    #topbar .logo { color: #00B4D8; font-size: 22px; font-weight: bold; letter-spacing: 4px; }
    #topbar .subtitle { color: #8B949E; font-size: 11px; }
    #slide-counter {
      margin-left: auto; background: rgba(0,180,216,0.2);
      border: 1px solid #00B4D8; border-radius: 20px;
      padding: 4px 14px; color: #00B4D8; font-size: 13px;
    }

    /* Bottom controls */
    #controls {
      background: linear-gradient(0deg, rgba(13,17,23,0.95) 0%, transparent 100%);
      padding: 24px 20px 20px;
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 16px;
      pointer-events: auto;
    }
    .btn {
      background: rgba(22,27,34,0.9); border: 1px solid #30363D;
      color: #F0F6FC; border-radius: 12px; padding: 12px 22px;
      font-family: 'Consolas', monospace; font-size: 15px;
      cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s; user-select: none;
      min-width: 60px; text-align: center;
    }
    .btn:active { transform: scale(0.93); }
    .btn.primary {
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, #00B4D8, #0077B6);
      border-color: #00B4D8; font-size: 17px; padding: 13px 28px;
    }
    .btn.danger { border-color: #F85149; color: #F85149; }

    /* Main slide display area */
    #slide-area {
      flex: 1; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
      padding: 10px 20px; pointer-events: none;
    }

    /* AR slide frame */
    #ar-frame {
      position: relative; width: 100%; max-width: 620px;
      border-radius: 16px; overflow: hidden;
      box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #00B4D8, 0 0 40px rgba(0,180,216,0.4), 0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.7);
      transform: perspective(900px) rotateX(3deg);
      transition: all 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1);
      pointer-events: auto;
    }
    #ar-frame.entering {
      animation: slideIn 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.34,1.56,0.64,1) forwards;
    }
    @keyframes slideIn {
      from { opacity:0; transform: perspective(900px) rotateX(3deg) scale(0.88) translateY(20px); }
      to   { opacity:1; transform: perspective(900px) rotateX(3deg) scale(1) translateY(0); }
    }

    #ar-frame img { width: 100%; display: block; }

    /* AR corner brackets */
    .corner {
      position: absolute; width: 22px; height: 22px;
      border-color: #00B4D8; border-style: solid;
    }
    .corner.tl { top:0; left:0;  border-width: 3px 0 0 3px; }
    .corner.tr { top:0; right:0; border-width: 3px 3px 0 0; }
    .corner.bl { bottom:0; left:0;  border-width: 0 0 3px 3px; }
    .corner.br { bottom:0; right:0; border-width: 0 3px 3px 0; }

    /* Scan line effect */
    #scanline {
      position: absolute; top:0; left:0; right:0; height: 3px;
      background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, #00B4D8, transparent);
      animation: scan 3s linear infinite;
      pointer-events: none;
    }
    @keyframes scan { from { top: 0; } to { top: 100%; } }

    /* Mode indicator */
    #mode-badge {
      position: absolute; top: 8px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%);
      background: rgba(57,211,83,0.2); border: 1px solid #39D353;
      color: #39D353; font-size: 11px; padding: 3px 12px; border-radius: 20px;
    }

    /* Camera mode background */
    #camera-bg {
      position: absolute; top:0; left:0; width:100%; height:100%;
      background: #0D1117; z-index: -1;
    }

    /* Marker guide */
    #marker-guide {
      position: absolute; top:50%; left:50%; transform: translate(-50%,-50%);
      border: 3px dashed rgba(0,180,216,0.5); border-radius: 16px;
      width: 260px; height: 260px;
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
      flex-direction: column; gap: 10px;
      animation: pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite;
    }
    @keyframes pulse {
      0%,100% { border-color: rgba(0,180,216,0.4); }
      50% { border-color: rgba(0,180,216,0.9); }
    }
    #marker-guide span { color: rgba(0,180,216,0.8); font-size: 12px; text-align:center; padding: 0 20px; }

    /* Status overlay for camera */
    #cam-status {
      display:none; position:absolute; top:50%; left:50%; transform:translate(-50%,-50%);
      color: #8B949E; font-size: 14px; text-align: center;
    }

    /* Slide thumbnails strip */
    #thumb-strip {
      position: absolute; bottom: 110px; left:0; right:0;
      display: flex; justify-content: center; gap: 6px; padding: 0 16px;
      pointer-events: auto; opacity: 0;
      transition: opacity 0.3s;
    }
    #thumb-strip.visible { opacity: 1; }
    .thumb {
      width: 52px; height: 30px; border-radius: 5px; overflow: hidden;
      border: 2px solid #30363D; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s; flex-shrink:0;
    }
    .thumb.active { border-color: #00B4D8; transform: scale(1.12); }
    .thumb img { width:100%; height:100%; object-fit:cover; }

    /* Mode switch */
    #mode-switch {
      position: absolute; top: 70px; right: 16px; pointer-events: auto;
      display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px;
    }
    .mode-btn {
      background: rgba(22,27,34,0.9); border: 1px solid #30363D;
      color: #8B949E; border-radius: 10px; padding: 8px 14px;
      font-size: 12px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s;
      white-space: nowrap;
    }
    .mode-btn.active { border-color: #00B4D8; color: #00B4D8; background: rgba(0,180,216,0.1); }

    /* Hidden in camera mode */
    .cam-hidden { display:none !important; }

    /* Fullscreen slide mode */
    #fullscreen-mode {
      display: none; position: fixed; top:0; left:0; width:100%; height:100%;
      background: #0D1117; z-index: 100; flex-direction:column;
    }
    #fullscreen-mode.active { display:flex; }
    #fs-img { flex:1; object-fit: contain; width:100%; }
    #fs-controls {
      padding: 16px; background: #161B22;
      display:flex; gap:12px; align-items:center; justify-content:center;
    }
    #fs-counter { color: #00B4D8; font-size: 14px; }
  </style>
</head>
<body>

<div id="ar-container">
  <!-- Camera / background -->
  <div id="camera-bg"></div>
  <video id="video" autoplay playsinline muted style="display:none;"></video>

  <!-- Main UI -->
  <div id="ui">
    <!-- Top bar -->
    <div id="topbar">
      <div>
        <div class="logo">🐧 LINUX AR</div>
        <div class="subtitle">Estructura y Funcionamiento</div>
      </div>
      <div id="slide-counter">1 / 8</div>
    </div>

    <!-- Slide area -->
    <div id="slide-area">
      <div id="ar-frame" class="entering">
        <div class="corner tl"></div>
        <div class="corner tr"></div>
        <div class="corner bl"></div>
        <div class="corner br"></div>
        <div id="scanline"></div>
        <img id="slide-img" src="" alt="Slide">
        <div id="mode-badge">● AR MODE</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Thumbnail strip -->
    <div id="thumb-strip"></div>

    <!-- Controls -->
    <div id="controls">
      <button class="btn" id="btn-prev" onclick="changeSlide(-1)">◀</button>
      <button class="btn primary" id="btn-cam" onclick="toggleCamera()">📷 Cámara</button>
      <button class="btn" id="btn-next" onclick="changeSlide(1)">▶</button>
      <button class="btn" onclick="toggleThumbs()">⊞</button>
      <button class="btn" onclick="openFullscreen()">⛶</button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Mode switch -->
  <div id="mode-switch">
    <button class="mode-btn active" onclick="setMode('ar')">🔮 AR</button>
    <button class="mode-btn" onclick="setMode('present')">📊 Presentar</button>
  </div>

  <!-- Marker guide (shown when camera is active) -->
  <div id="marker-guide" style="display:none;">
    <span>📌</span>
    <span>Apunta al marcador impreso para activar AR</span>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Fullscreen mode -->
<div id="fullscreen-mode">
  <img id="fs-img" src="" alt="">
  <div id="fs-controls">
    <button class="btn" onclick="fsSlide(-1)">◀ Anterior</button>
    <span id="fs-counter" class="btn">1 / 8</span>
    <button class="btn" onclick="fsSlide(1)">Siguiente ▶</button>
    <button class="btn danger" onclick="closeFullscreen()">✕ Cerrar</button>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
const SLIDES = [
  "data:image/jpeg;base64,",
  "data:image/jpeg;base64,",
  "data:image/jpeg;base64,",
  "data:image/jpeg;base64,",
  "data:image/jpeg;base64,",
  "data:image/jpeg;base64,",
  "data:image/jpeg;base64,",
  "data:image/jpeg;base64,",
];


let currentSlide = 0;
let cameraActive = false;
let thumbsVisible = false;
let currentMode = 'ar';
const total = SLIDES.length;

// Initialize
function init() {
  updateSlide();
  buildThumbs();
}

function updateSlide() {
  const img = document.getElementById('slide-img');
  const frame = document.getElementById('ar-frame');
  const counter = document.getElementById('slide-counter');
  const fsImg = document.getElementById('fs-img');
  const fsCounter = document.getElementById('fs-counter');

  // Animate
  frame.classList.remove('entering');
  void frame.offsetWidth;
  frame.classList.add('entering');

  img.src = SLIDES[currentSlide];
  fsImg.src = SLIDES[currentSlide];
  counter.textContent = `${currentSlide + 1} / ${total}`;
  fsCounter.textContent = `${currentSlide + 1} / ${total}`;

  // Update thumbs
  document.querySelectorAll('.thumb').forEach((t, i) => {
    t.classList.toggle('active', i === currentSlide);
  });
}

function changeSlide(dir) {
  currentSlide = (currentSlide + dir + total) % total;
  updateSlide();
}

function buildThumbs() {
  const strip = document.getElementById('thumb-strip');
  SLIDES.forEach((src, i) => {
    const div = document.createElement('div');
    div.className = 'thumb' + (i === 0 ? ' active' : '');
    div.onclick = () => { currentSlide = i; updateSlide(); };
    const img = document.createElement('img');
    img.src = src;
    div.appendChild(img);
    strip.appendChild(div);
  });
}

function toggleThumbs() {
  thumbsVisible = !thumbsVisible;
  document.getElementById('thumb-strip').classList.toggle('visible', thumbsVisible);
}

// Camera AR
async function toggleCamera() {
  const video = document.getElementById('video');
  const guide = document.getElementById('marker-guide');
  const btn = document.getElementById('btn-cam');
  const badge = document.getElementById('mode-badge');

  if (!cameraActive) {
    try {
      const stream = await navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia({
        video: { facingMode: { ideal: 'environment' }, width: { ideal: 1280 } }
      });
      video.srcObject = stream;
      video.style.display = 'block';
      guide.style.display = 'flex';
      btn.textContent = '⏹ Detener';
      btn.style.background = 'linear-gradient(135deg,#F85149,#B91C1C)';
      badge.textContent = '● CÁMARA AR';
      badge.style.borderColor = '#39D353';
      badge.style.color = '#39D353';
      cameraActive = true;
    } catch(e) {
      alert('Para activar la cámara AR, abre este archivo en un servidor local o usa HTTPS.\n\nTip: Puedes usar Live Server en VSCode o npx http-server');
    }
  } else {
    const stream = video.srcObject;
    if (stream) stream.getTracks().forEach(t => t.stop());
    video.style.display = 'none';
    guide.style.display = 'none';
    btn.textContent = '📷 Cámara';
    btn.style.background = '';
    badge.textContent = '● AR MODE';
    cameraActive = false;
  }
}

function setMode(mode) {
  currentMode = mode;
  document.querySelectorAll('.mode-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
  event.target.classList.add('active');

  const frame = document.getElementById('ar-frame');
  const scanline = document.getElementById('scanline');

  if (mode === 'present') {
    frame.style.transform = 'perspective(900px) rotateX(0deg)';
    frame.style.boxShadow = '0 0 0 1px #30363D, 0 20px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.5)';
    scanline.style.display = 'none';
    document.getElementById('mode-badge').style.display = 'none';
  } else {
    frame.style.transform = 'perspective(900px) rotateX(3deg)';
    frame.style.boxShadow = '0 0 0 2px #00B4D8, 0 0 40px rgba(0,180,216,0.4), 0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.7)';
    scanline.style.display = 'block';
    document.getElementById('mode-badge').style.display = 'block';
  }
}

function openFullscreen() {
  document.getElementById('fullscreen-mode').classList.add('active');
  updateSlide();
}
function closeFullscreen() {
  document.getElementById('fullscreen-mode').classList.remove('active');
}
function fsSlide(dir) {
  currentSlide = (currentSlide + dir + total) % total;
  updateSlide();
}

// Keyboard navigation
document.addEventListener('keydown', e => {
  if (e.key === 'ArrowRight' || e.key === 'ArrowDown') changeSlide(1);
  if (e.key === 'ArrowLeft'  || e.key === 'ArrowUp')   changeSlide(-1);
  if (e.key === 'f' || e.key === 'F') openFullscreen();
  if (e.key === 'Escape') closeFullscreen();
});

// Swipe support
let touchX = 0;
document.getElementById('ar-frame').addEventListener('touchstart', e => { touchX = e.touches[0].clientX; });
document.getElementById('ar-frame').addEventListener('touchend', e => {
  const dx = e.changedTouches[0].clientX - touchX;
  if (Math.abs(dx) > 50) changeSlide(dx < 0 ? 1 : -1);
});

init();
</script>
</body>
</html>
